channel.title: JJSARecords
channel.description: Research topics narrated for the family.
channel.itunes:author: JJSARecords

item.title: How Passkeys Work — requested by chefjues
item.description: A quick overview of passkeys: public-key cryptography, WebAuthn, FIDO2, and why they make passwords obsolete.

item.title: Prompt Engineering Best Practices — requested by chefjues
item.description: A quick overview of the latest best practices for writing prompts in 2025: precision, few-shot, chain-of-thought, self-consistency, and why less is more with reasoning models.

item.title: Sapporo Family Holiday in June — requested by chefjues
item.description: A quick overview of planning a 4-day family trip to Sapporo in June: weather, the YOSAKOI festival, top attractions, food highlights, and practical tips for a family of three.

item.title: Octopuses Are Rewriting Their Own DNA — requested by chefjues
item.description: The mind-bending discovery that octopuses can edit their own RNA in real time — retuning their nervous systems in response to temperature changes at over 13,000 sites simultaneously.

item.title: AI in Banking SDLC: Risks You Can't Ignore — requested by chefjues
item.description: A deep dive into the risks AI-enabled software delivery introduces into banking: data exfiltration, shadow AI, hallucinated production code, broken audit trails, and supply chain attacks. With real examples, root causes, and what to do about it — in Julian voice.
